---
title: "Deep learning and surplus production models for multivariate autoregressive modeling and simulation of the jack mackerel fishery associated with environmental conditions"
author: "Plaza-Vega, F.; Yáñez, E.; Fréon, P.; Araya, H.; Aranis, A."
date: '2026-01-02'
date-format: "YYYY"
slug: jack-mackerel-deep-learning-surplus-production
categories:
  - Investigación
  - Deep Learning
  - Pesquerías
  - Medio ambiente
description: "Modelación y simulación de la pesquería de jurel mediante deep learning, modelos de producción excedentaria y condiciones ambientales."
image: cover.png
lang: es
format:
  html:
    image: cover.png
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Figura representativa:** reemplazar `cover.png` por una figura del artículo o subir material complementario a `figures/`.
:::

## Cita

Plaza-Vega, F., Yáñez, E., Fréon, P., Araya, H., & Aranis, A. (2026). Deep learning and surplus production models for multivariate autoregressive modeling and simulation of the jack mackerel fishery associated with environmental conditions. *Deep Sea Research Part II: Topical Studies in Oceanography*, 227, 105645.
